svg.title: Desktop Works and Logo Wall
svg.desc: Editable SVG design layer for Hsin-Hsin Yuan portfolio. Import into Figma and ungroup to edit text, shapes, and image layers.

text.tspan: Compact cards for browsing multiple projects at once. Use
this frame to tune poster crops, card density, and work
hierarchy before translating changes back into code.
From AI to deep tech, stories of
A documentary on the Paris Cultural

g.text: No boxes, no heavy boundary, just a quiet trust strip.
